arts.sum: Earlier this month, Brighton & Hove Albion were keen on agreeing a deal with Brøndby IF for Clement Bischoff to arrive at The Amex in the summer. The two clubs reached an agreement and the left-back reportedly travelled to England to carry out medical tests with the Seagulls.
